title: Create: Automatic Netherite
description: Easy way to generate netherite with create machines
body:
Automatic Netherite is an addition to the Create mod that adds a lightweight but powerful automation path to make Netherite resources utilizing Create's mechanical processing systems. Rather than adding heavy machinery or new progression chains, this mod focuses on smooth recipe integration that enhances the late-game material loop.
The mod introduces two main features of processing. Firstly, the Bulk Haunting recipe enables players to convert Blackstone into Netherrack, thus making the Nether materials renewable and automatible without having to explore the Nether. Secondly, the Milling recipe transforms Netherrack into by-products of specified probabilities: 1% Netherite Scrap, 10% Quartz, and 20% Cinder Flour. This milling system creates a balanced yet rewarding automation route that makes Netherite generation possible through mechanical effort and resource scaling rather than direct mining.

Thus, Create: Automatic Netherite encourages creative factory design and resource engineering by perfectly integrating with Create's belts, crushers, and deployers. It serves as a fittingly compact addition for modpacks looking to take a more industrial or renewable approach to the production of Netherite without being game-breaking or disrupting the mechanical charm imbued by Create.
